notes: PROBABLE 404 — frontend GETs /api/ListIPWhitelist via CippDataTable in geoiplookup page, but no Invoke-ListIPWhitelist.ps1 exists. Add/remove actions correctly use /api/ExecAddTrustedIP. Fix: rename PS1 to Invoke-ListIPWhitelist or update the CippDataTable url.
